chunk.text: Du rêve à la réalité Peter Hancock, Président de Koniambo Nickel SAS Conférence de Nickel, Nouméa, le 3 juillet 2013 A brief introduction to who we are 2 Commissioning a US$5 billion FeNi industrial plant in the North Province of New Caledonia Executed with the full support of our shareholders Glencore Xstrata and SMSP, and the North Province. Our employees live in the VKP (Voh-Kone-Pouembout) Koniambo is benefitting both the people of the North Province and all of New Caledonia SMSP/North Province’s 51% stake will see revenues flowing to the public finances of New Caledonia once cash flow positive The long journey from dream to reality Bercy Accord, industrial agreement between SMSP and industrial partner Project Agreement Approval of Project Fiscal stability agreement Completion of Line 1 construction Start of commercial production 1998 2007 2012 2013 www.koniambonickel.nc Ramping up to 60,000 tpa Construction of infrastructure built by a global workforce Operations workforce drawn from Glencore’s global operations and French and New Caledonian industrial expertise First metal produced from our first line in April 2013.

chunk.text: ce drawn from Glencore’s global operations and French and New Caledonian industrial expertise First metal produced from our first line in April 2013. Line 2 first metal in early 2014 Two year ramp up to full production A safe and environmentally responsible workplace www.koniambonickel.nc Ore Reserves – 25 year mine plan 62.5mt @ 2.40% Vast resource for future expansion Saprolite (Meas) 142mt @ 2.13% Saprolite (Inf) 156mt @ 2.15% Limonite 100mt @ 1.50% A world class ore body Key Project Milestones L1 Power Station: First steam L1 L2 First Ore to Furnace 2 L2 Power Station: First steam L2 Plant: Commercial Production L1 First ore to Furnace 1 Q2 2013 Q3 2013 Q4 2013 Q1 2014 Plant : Commercial Production Q2 2014
